# Honolulu Roofing Pros

> Honolulu's 5-star roof repair & replacement contractor. Leak repair, full re-roofs, storm damage & free inspections. Licensed & insured. Serving Honolulu, Kapolei, Kaneohe, Aiea & Ewa Beach.

Honolulu Roofing Pros is a roofing contractor serving Honolulu, HI and surrounding areas: Honolulu, Kapolei, Kaneohe, Aiea, Ewa Beach, Mililani.
Rated 4.9 stars across 96 reviews. Phone: (808) 555-0147. Website: https://honoluluroofingpros.com

## Services
- Roof Repair
- Roof Replacement
- Leak & Storm Damage Repair
- Free Roof Inspections

## Service Area
Honolulu, Kapolei, Kaneohe, Aiea, Ewa Beach, Mililani

## Frequently Asked Questions
### How much does a roof replacement cost in Honolulu?
Most roof replacements on Oahu range from $12,000 to $30,000 depending on size, pitch, and material (asphalt shingle, metal, or tile). Honolulu's climate and salt air affect material choice. We provide a free written estimate before any work begins.

### Do you offer free roof inspections in Honolulu?
Yes. Honolulu Roofing Pros provides free roof inspections across Honolulu, Kapolei, Kaneohe, Aiea, and Ewa Beach. We honestly assess whether a repair or full replacement makes sense.

### What roofing material is best for Hawaii's climate?
On Oahu, metal and tile roofs hold up best against salt air, UV, and heavy rain, while quality asphalt shingles remain a cost-effective option. We help you pick the right material for your home and budget.

### How fast can you respond to a roof leak?
We prioritize active leaks and storm damage and typically inspect within 24 hours. Call (808) 555-0147 to get on the schedule fast.

## Contact
Call (808) 555-0147 for a free quote. Serving Honolulu and the surrounding region.
